name: @coveo/atomic-a11y
description: Accessibility utilities and tools for Coveo Atomic components

scripts.a11y:vpat: pnpm build && node scripts/json-to-openacr.mjs && node scripts/validate-openacr.mjs && npx --yes @openacr/openacr output -f reports/openacr.yaml -o reports/vpat-2.5-coveo-atomic.md -t scripts/vpat-from-openacr.handlebars
